name: aeo-infra
description: Infrastructure operations skills covering AWS CLI v2, Azure CLI, Lima (Linux VMs on Apple Silicon), MLX/oMLX local LLM serving on Apple Silicon, and GL-iNet Slate 7 travel router (Wi-Fi 7, VPN, SSH, recovery); plus /lima and /lima-doctor agentic springboards — credential management, service patterns, virtualization, local LLM tuning, cloud operations, and network appliance configuration
